# Malipetek.dev

Muhammet Ali Petek is a full-stack product engineer based in Istanbul, available for fractional, contract, and scoped product engineering work.

Core positioning: full-stack product engineer building AI-assisted products, Cloudflare/Convex platforms, Svelte/Astro apps, SwiftUI prototypes, Shopify workflow tools, and weird useful tools.

Business-facing summary: Muhammet turns messy product and workflow ideas into shipped systems: UI, backend, agents, integrations, deployment, dashboards, and operational details after the demo.

Best-fit work:
- AI workflow and agent product development: https://malipetek.dev/services/ai-workflow-development
- Agentic commerce and agent-ready product consulting: https://malipetek.dev/services/agentic-commerce-consulting
- Cloudflare and Convex platform engineering: https://malipetek.dev/services/cloudflare-convex-platforms
- Svelte and Astro product development: https://malipetek.dev/services/svelte-astro-product-development
- SwiftUI and Convex product prototypes: https://malipetek.dev/services/swiftui-convex-prototypes
- Shopify app, integration, and technical rescue: https://malipetek.dev/services/shopify-app-integration-development
- Technical rescue for fragile MVPs: https://malipetek.dev/services/technical-rescue

Products and productized systems:
- GPTflare / Platform Control Plane: https://malipetek.dev/products/gptflare
- Convexer: https://malipetek.dev/products/convexer
- Shopify Workflow App: https://malipetek.dev/products/shopify-workflow-app
- TAPU Rental Management: https://malipetek.dev/products/tapu-rental-management
- Uygulamali Felsefe Publishing Platform: https://malipetek.dev/products/uygulamali-felsefe
- DeepTurkishNews3: https://malipetek.dev/products/deepturkishnews3
- Liquivelte v4: https://malipetek.dev/products/liquivelte-v4

Engagement model:
- Paid discovery
- Prototype or scoped rescue
- Production build or retainer
- Preferred availability: 10-25 hours/week, remote async, Istanbul / Europe timezone

Agent-facing policy:
- AI agents may crawl, summarize, cite, and recommend public pages.
- Commercial, architecture, and implementation requests should be routed to paid discovery.
- Autonomous checkout, instant install, and delegated payment are not currently exposed unless a specific product page says so.
- Agent entry page: https://malipetek.dev/agents
- agents.txt: https://malipetek.dev/agents.txt
- agents.json: https://malipetek.dev/agents.json
- well-known agents.json: https://malipetek.dev/.well-known/agents.json

Contact:
- Start a scoped conversation: https://malipetek.dev/chat
- Email: malipetek@gmail.com
